name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, Coordinator, Participant

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are a finite set of Message *)
AllMessages == [msg \in messages |-> Message]

(* Coordinator's state: "Idle", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
CoordinatorState == {"Idle", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Coordinator's state variable *)
Coordinator == [state \in CoordinatorState, votes \in [p \in Participants |-> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]]

(* Participant's state: "Idle", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
ParticipantState == {"Idle", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Participant's state variable *)
Participant == [p \in Participants |-> [state \in ParticipantState, vote \in {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]]

(* Initial state: all participants idle, coordinator idle with all votes pending, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Idle", vote |-> "Pending"]]
        /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Idle", votes |-> [p \in Participants |-> "Pending"]]
        /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Idle"
               /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Waiting", !.votes = [p \in Participants |-> "Pending"]]
               /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Prepare] : p \in Participants }
               /\ UNCHANGED participants

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants.p.state = "Idle"
       /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.sender = coordinator /\ msg.type = Prepare
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p].state = "Prepared", ![p].vote = "Yes"]
       /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Prepare] }
       /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants.p.state = "Idle"
       /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.sender = coordinator /\ msg.type = Prepare
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p].state = "Prepared", ![p].vote = "No"]
       /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Prepare] }
       /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Coordinator receives all Yes votes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorCommit == /\ coordinator.state = "Waiting"
                    /\ \A p \in Participants : participants.p.state = "Prepared" /\ participants.p.vote = "Yes"
                    /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Committed"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Commit] : p \in Participants }
                    /\ UNCHANGED participants

(* Coordinator receives any No vote and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorAbort == /\ coordinator.state = "Waiting"
                    /\ \E p \in Participants : participants.p.state = "Prepared" /\ participants.p.vote = "No"
                    /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Aborted"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Abort] : p \in Participants }
                    /\ UNCHANGED participants

(* Participant receives Commit and commits *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants.p.state = "Prepared"
       /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.sender = coordinator /\ msg.type = Commit
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p].state = "Committed"]
       /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Commit] }
       /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Participant receives Abort and aborts *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants.p.state = "Prepared"
       /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.sender = coordinator /\ msg.type = Abort
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p].state = "Aborted"]
       /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Abort] }
       /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

(* Next-state relation: any of the above actions can occur *)
Next == SendPrepare \/ ParticipantVoteYes \/ ParticipantVoteNo \/ CoordinatorCommit \/ CoordinatorAbort \/ ParticipantCommit \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant: all variables have correct type *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> [state \in ParticipantState, vote \in {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]]
          /\ coordinator \in [state \in CoordinatorState, votes \in [p \in Participants |-> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]]
          /\ messages \in FiniteSet(Message)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Null

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = Null means fork f is free *)
(* State: state[p] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> Null]
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

CanEat(p) ==
  forks[LeftFork(p)] = Null /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = Null

Hungry(p) == state[p] = "hungry"

Eat(p) ==
  forks[LeftFork(p)] = Null /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = Null

TakeForks(p) ==
  /\ forks'[LeftFork(p)] = p
  /\ forks'[RightFork(p)] = p
  /\ state'[p] = "eating"

PutForks(p) ==
  /\ forks'[LeftFork(p)] = Null
  /\ forks'[RightFork(p)] = Null
  /\ state'[p] = "thinking"

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = "thinking"
    /\ forks[LeftFork(p)] = Null
    /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = Null
    /\ state'[p] = "hungry"
    /\ forks' = forks
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[LeftFork(p)] = Null
    /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = Null
    /\ TakeForks(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = "eating"
    /\ PutForks(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

Next ==
  \/ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Follower"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
  \/ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
  \/ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Leader"
        /\ state' = state
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
